channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: Blast at fireworks factory in China kills 21
item.description:
Matched Titles:

- China fireworks factory explosion kills 26, injures 61
- China: Explosion at fireworks factory kills at least 26
- China: Explosion at fireworks factory kills at least 26
- Fireworks plant explosion in China kills at least 26, state media say
- Explosion at a fireworks plant in China kills at least 21 people, injures dozens more: report

- Explosion at fireworks factory in China kills 26, injures 61
- Explosion at China fireworks factory kills 26 people
- Explosion at Fireworks Factory in China Kills 26, Injures 61
- 21 people killed and dozens injured in massive explosion at fireworks plant in China
- Fireworks Factory Explosion in China Kills at Least 21

- 21 people killed, dozens injured in China fireworks factory blast
- Blast at fireworks factory in China’s Hunan kills 21, Xi calls for probe: State media
- 21 killed, 61 injured in blast at fireworks factory in China
- Blast at fireworks factory in China's Hunan kills 21

- Explosion at a fireworks plant in China kills at least 21 people, state media says

- Explosion at a fireworks plant in China kills at least 21 people, state media says
